item.title: Director's Hearing
item.description: Director's Hearing is scheduled for June 15, 2026 at 4:00 PM at City Council Chambers, 501 Poli St., Ventura, CA 93001. The source did not provide additional background.

item.title: Midtown Community Council
item.description: Midtown Community Council is scheduled for June 11, 2026 at 6:00 PM at Ventura, CA 93002. The source listing provides the public with the time and location for the Ventura event.

item.title: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours Scheduled
item.description: Housing Rights Center (HRC) Office Hours is scheduled for June 2, 2026 at 9:30 AM at Tuesdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. Thursdays: Anacapa Conference Room from 9:30 a.m.
